title: Restore full-project Python Ruff CI coverage
description:
Why this exists: project-LICHEN-py4c.1.16 pins Ruff to the tested 0.15 line, but full-project E902 No such file or directory (os error 2)
--> src:1:1

E902 No such file or directory (os error 2)
--> tests:1:1

Found 2 errors. has a historical baseline outside the dashboard/dependency surfaces touched by that bead. CI now enforces Ruff only on the dependency/dashboard owned paths to keep the pinning bead mergeable. What needs to be done: clean or explicitly configure the full Python Ruff baseline, then restore full-project Ruff enforcement in CI with passing evidence.
notes: No-hardware implementation evidence (2026-07-03): restored full-project Python Ruff enforcement in CI by changing the Python job lint step to uv run ruff check src tests pyproject.toml from the existing python working directory. Cleaned the historical Ruff 0.15 baseline across Python source/tests with scoped mechanical and semantic fixes: sorted imports, removed unused imports/locals, moved typing imports to collections.abc, removed redundant UTF-8 encode args, wrapped long lines, added zip(..., strict=True) where byte streams/lists are intentionally matched, preserved serial exception causes with raise ... from exc, replaced timeout/close try-pass blocks with contextlib.suppress, and tightened legacy invalid-CBOR test from blind Exception to ValueError. No generated twister-out or build artifacts committed.\nValidation evidence (2026-07-03, local no-hardware): cd python && uv run ruff check src tests pyproject.toml => All checks passed. repo root: uv run --project python ruff check python/src python/tests python/pyproject.toml => All checks passed. cd python && uv run pytest -q tests/crypto/test_edhoc.py tests/interface/test_kiss_aprs.py tests/interface/test_kiss_aprs_synth.py tests/interface/test_kiss_ax25.py tests/interface/test_kiss_callsign.py tests/interface/test_kiss_framing.py tests/interface/test_kiss_handler.py tests/interface/test_kiss_integration.py tests/interface/test_kiss_serial.py tests/interface/test_meshtastic_translate.py tests/interface/test_messages.py tests/interface/test_serial.py tests/interface/test_tcp.py tests/coap/test_udp_server.py tests/sim/test_chaos.py => 362 passed in 1.05s. git diff --check => passed. Full-suite note: one reviewer attempted full pytest; unrelated local Renode integration port 127.0.0.1:5555 was already in use, matching pre-existing local full-suite instability tracked separately.\nReview evidence: Noether reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; reran full Ruff, focused pytest 289 passed, and diff check. Epicurus reported no P0/P1/P2 findings; reran full Ruff and focused pytest 289 passed; noted full pytest only failed on unrelated Renode port already in use. Nash reported no P0/P1/P2 findings on high-risk CI/EDHOC/serial/TCP/message files; reran full Ruff and targeted serial/TCP/message pytest 42 passed.
close_reason: Completed: full-project Python Ruff baseline is clean and CI lint step now runs uv run ruff check src tests pyproject.toml; validation and three independent reviews passed.
